name: Asaptic Labs
description: Research and operating company building AI agents at three crossings where decisions are irreversible: quantum security, embodied hardware, and physical-world human care.

areas.label: × Quantum security
areas.summary: Post-quantum trust primitives for agent identity, delegation chains, and irreversible financial authorisations. Building the cryptographic infrastructure agents will need when classical signature schemes are broken.

areas.label: × Hardware
areas.summary: Closing the perception-decision-actuation loop with reversibility accounting, calibrated escalation, and hard safety constraints. Agents that act in the physical world carry accountability into the physical world.

areas.label: × Physical-world human care
areas.summary: Override-labeling and human-in-the-loop architecture for regulated human environments — eldercare, clinical-adjacent workflows, learning. The dataset compounds inside deployment, not outside it.

scope: AI agents at the crossings of post-quantum security, embodied hardware, and physical-world human care
